# Sdance AI

## Overview

Sdance AI is an independent AI creation website at [https://sdanceai.com](https://sdanceai.com). The site presents Seedance video workflows, image generation and editing workflows, public examples, reusable prompts, pricing information, and developer documentation.

The configured site description says SdanceAI lets users experience Seedance 2.0, create high-quality AI videos with native audio sync, and use stable API access for developer integrations. The current homepage copy also describes production-ready image generation and editing for posters, product photos, social creatives, and design mockups.

Sdance AI states that it is an independent product and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by AI model providers.

## Target Users

- Creators making AI video, image, and social content.
- Marketing, ecommerce, media, startup, education, and design teams creating campaign or product visuals.
- Developers looking for public documentation for AI generation integration.
- Visitors comparing examples, prompts, pricing, and product pages before signing in.

## Core Features

- Text-to-video and image-to-video workflows for supported video models.
- Seedance 2.0 workflows with text, image, video, and audio references.
- Seedance 1.5-oriented product content for AI video production workflows.
- Image generation and image editing workflows for commercial creative assets.
- Public showcase pages for successful generated media.
- Prompt gallery pages for reusable Seedance 2.0 prompts and related outputs.
- Pricing pages for the online experience and API service.
- Public API documentation for access setup, generation, task status, generation history, and credits.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://sdanceai.com) - Main public entry point. The English homepage text says: "Experience Seedance 2.0 on SdanceAI. Create high-quality AI videos with native audio sync. We provide stable API access for developers to integrate AI video."
- [Features](https://sdanceai.com/#features) - Feature section linked from the public header and footer.
- [Showcase](https://sdanceai.com/showcase) - "Browse successful public generations from the community and open any item to inspect the prompt, settings, and output."
- [Prompts](https://sdanceai.com/prompts) - "Browse reusable Seedance 2.0 prompts and review generated results with input materials."
- [Blog](https://sdanceai.com/blog) - "Insights on AI video creation, product updates, and creator workflows."
- [Pricing](https://sdanceai.com/pricing) - Pricing plans for Seedance 2.0 and the online/API service.
- [API Docs](https://sdanceai.com/apidoc) - Public AI Studio API documentation for integration workflow, task status, history, and credits.
- [Seedance 2](https://sdanceai.com/seedance2) - Product page for Seedance 2.0 video generation workflows.
- [Seedance 1.5](https://sdanceai.com/seedance-15) - Product page for SdanceAI platform capabilities around Seedance 1.5 and related video workflows.
- [About / Contact](https://sdanceai.com/about#contact-us) - About page and public contact section.

## Localized Pages

Supported locales are read from configuration as English, 中文, and 日本語. English is the default locale and uses root paths. Chinese and Japanese use locale-prefixed paths.

### English

- [SdanceAI](https://sdanceai.com) - Seedance 2.0 Online Experience & API Service.
- [Features](https://sdanceai.com/#features) - Public homepage feature section.
- [Seedance 2.0 Showcase](https://sdanceai.com/showcase) - Browse successful public generations and inspect prompts, settings, and outputs.
- [Seedance 2.0 Prompt Gallery](https://sdanceai.com/prompts) - Browse reusable Seedance 2.0 prompts and generated results.
- [Blog Posts](https://sdanceai.com/blog) - Insights on AI video creation, product updates, and creator workflows.
- [Seedance 2.0 Pricing](https://sdanceai.com/pricing) - View Seedance 2.0 online experience and API pricing.
- [AI Studio API Documentation](https://sdanceai.com/apidoc) - Learn access setup, AI video generation, task status, history, and credits.
- [Seedance 2](https://sdanceai.com/seedance2) - Seedance 2.0 video workflows and capabilities.
- [Seedance 1.5](https://sdanceai.com/seedance-15) - Independent AI video studio and API page for Seedance 1.5-oriented workflows.
- [About](https://sdanceai.com/about#contact-us) - About the site and contact section.
- [Glossary](https://sdanceai.com/glossary) - Glossary of terms and concepts.
- [AI Use Cases](https://sdanceai.com/use-cases) - Curated AI use case pages.
- [AI Prompt Templates](https://sdanceai.com/templates) - Curated prompt template pages.
- [AI Alternatives](https://sdanceai.com/alternatives) - Alternative pages for comparison-oriented visitors.
- [AI Comparisons](https://sdanceai.com/compare) - Side-by-side AI product and model comparisons.

### 中文

- [SdanceAI](https://sdanceai.com/zh) - Seedance 2.0 在线体验 与 API 服务。
- [功能特性](https://sdanceai.com/zh#features) - 首页公开功能区。
- [seedance 2.0 作品展示](https://sdanceai.com/zh/showcase) - 浏览社区中公开且生成成功的作品，查看提示词、参数和结果。
- [Seedance 2.0 提示词库](https://sdanceai.com/zh/prompts) - 浏览可直接复用的 Seedance 2.0 提示词，查看生成结果与输入素材。
- [博客列表](https://sdanceai.com/zh/blog) - 分享 AI 视频创作经验、产品更新与创作者实战内容。
- [Seedance 2.0 价格](https://sdanceai.com/zh/pricing) - 查看 Seedance 2.0 的价格方案。
- [AI Studio API 文档](https://sdanceai.com/zh/apidoc) - 了解鉴权、AI 视频生成、任务状态查询、生成记录读取和用户积分查询方式。
- [Seedance 2](https://sdanceai.com/zh/seedance2) - Seedance 2.0 视频生成工作流与能力页面。
- [Seedance 1.5](https://sdanceai.com/zh/seedance-15) - SdanceAI 平台围绕 Seedance 1.5 和相关视频工作流的产品页面。
- [关于我们](https://sdanceai.com/zh/about#contact-us) - 关于页面与联系方式。
- [术语表](https://sdanceai.com/zh/glossary) - Next.js SaaS 开发术语和概念的综合词汇表。
- [AI 应用场景](https://sdanceai.com/zh/use-cases) - 为长尾 SEO 和产品转化设计的 AI 应用场景页面。
- [AI 提示词模板](https://sdanceai.com/zh/templates) - 为搜索意图和转化承接设计的 AI 提示词模板页面。
- [AI 替代方案](https://sdanceai.com/zh/alternatives) - 面向替代方案比较的公开内容页面。
- [AI 对比页](https://sdanceai.com/zh/compare) - 围绕工具、模型和工作流选择构建的 AI 对比页。

### 日本語

- [SdanceAI](https://sdanceai.com/ja) - Seedance 2.0 オンライン体験版 & API サービス。
- [機能特性](https://sdanceai.com/ja#features) - 公開ホームページの機能セクション。
- [Seedance 2.0 作品展示](https://sdanceai.com/ja/showcase) - 公開され、正常に生成された作品を一覧し、詳細でプロンプトや設定を確認できます。
- [Seedance 2.0 プロンプト集](https://sdanceai.com/ja/prompts) - 再利用できる Seedance 2.0 のプロンプトと生成結果を確認できます。
- [ブログ記事](https://sdanceai.com/ja/blog) - AI動画制作の知見、プロダクト更新、クリエイター向け実践情報。
- [Seedance 2.0の料金](https://sdanceai.com/ja/pricing) - Seedance 2.0 の料金プラン。
- [AI Studio API ドキュメント](https://sdanceai.com/ja/apidoc) - 認証、AI動画生成、タスク結果、生成履歴、クレジット確認方法。
- [Seedance 2](https://sdanceai.com/ja/seedance2) - Seedance 2.0 動画生成ワークフローと機能ページ。
- [Seedance 1.5](https://sdanceai.com/ja/seedance-15) - Seedance 1.5 関連ワークフロー向けの SdanceAI 製品ページ。
- [About](https://sdanceai.com/ja/about#contact-us) - About page and contact section.
- [用語集](https://sdanceai.com/ja/glossary) - Next.js SaaS開発の用語と概念の包括的な用語集。
- [AI ユースケース](https://sdanceai.com/ja/use-cases) - AI ユースケースページ。
- [AI プロンプトテンプレート](https://sdanceai.com/ja/templates) - AI プロンプトテンプレートページ。
- [AI 代替ページ](https://sdanceai.com/ja/alternatives) - 比較意図の高い代替ページ。
- [AI 比較ページ](https://sdanceai.com/ja/compare) - ツール・モデル・ワークフロー選定向けの AI 比較ページ。

## Content Resources

- [Showcase](https://sdanceai.com/showcase) - Public generated media entries.
- [Prompts](https://sdanceai.com/prompts) - Seedance 2.0 prompt gallery.
- [Blog](https://sdanceai.com/blog) - Public articles and product/workflow updates.
- [Glossary](https://sdanceai.com/glossary) - Public glossary entries when available.
- [Use Cases](https://sdanceai.com/use-cases) - Public use case content when available.
- [Templates](https://sdanceai.com/templates) - Public template content when available.
- [Alternatives](https://sdanceai.com/alternatives) - Public alternative pages when available.
- [Comparisons](https://sdanceai.com/compare) - Public comparison pages when available.

Published CMS detail pages may appear in the sitemap only when they are published and public.

## Contact / Social Links

- [Support email](mailto:support@sdanceai.com)
- [GitHub prompt repository](https://github.com/sdanceai/awesome_seedance2_prompt)

No Twitter, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, or Discord URL is listed here because no fixed public URL is configured in `siteConfig`.

## Legal Pages

- [Privacy Policy](https://sdanceai.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://sdanceai.com/terms-of-service)
- [Refund Policy](https://sdanceai.com/refund-policy)

## Notes for AI Assistants

- Use [https://sdanceai.com](https://sdanceai.com) for English/default pages.
- Use `/zh` and `/ja` prefixes only for the configured non-default locales.
- Do not invent unlisted locales or pages.
- Do not cite non-public or internal service paths as public documentation pages.
- Do not include static build asset paths.
